message.content:
You need to adapt ALL existing pages in C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\pages\ to the new Vercel-style layout. 

DO NOT modify any files in services/, config/, types/, or lib/. ONLY modify page files (pages/*.tsx).

For each page file, you need to:
1. Add `import PageHeader from '../components/layout/PageHeader';` if not already present
2. Remove wrapper padding from the OUTERMOST div — specifically remove classes like `w-full px-4 py-10`, `w-full px-6 py-8`, `max-w-[1400px] mx-auto`, `min-h-screen`, `min-h-[80vh]`, `min-h-[calc(100vh-3.5rem)]` from the outer wrapper
3. Add a `<PageHeader title="..." description="..." />` as the first child inside the outer div (UNLESS the page already has its own elaborate header that shouldn't be replaced, in which case leave it but still remove the wrapper padding)
4. DO NOT change any service imports, state management, props, or business logic
5. DO NOT modify Home.tsx or Login.tsx (they are public pages with their own layout)

PageHeader component usage:
```tsx
<PageHeader title="Page Title" description="Optional description" />
```

The PageHeader uses negative margins (-mx-6 md:-mx-8 -mt-6 md:-mt-8 mb-6) internally to extend to the edges of AppShell's padding.

Page title mapping (use these exact titles):
- Dashboard.tsx → "Dashboard" / "Vue d'ensemble de votre activité AEO"
- Analyze.tsx → "Nouvel Audit" / "Analysez votre visibilité dans les réponses IA"
- Results.tsx → skip (has its own complex header)
- Projects.tsx → skip (has its own complex header)
- GenerativeTools.tsx → "Outils Génératifs" / "Générez du contenu optimisé pour les moteurs IA"
- SMCStudio.tsx → "AEO Studio" / "Créez du contenu optimisé pour les citations IA"
- SourceOfTruth.tsx → "Source of Truth" / "Configurez votre identité de marque"
- SchemaOrg.tsx → "Schema.org" / "Générez des données structurées pour votre site"
- RobotsTxt.tsx → "Robots.txt" / "Configurez l'accès des bots IA à votre site"
- LlmsTxtGenerator.tsx → "Générateur llms.txt" / "Créez un fichier llms.txt pour les LLMs"
- BlogOptimizer.tsx → "Blog Optimizer" / "Optimisez vos articles pour les moteurs IA"
- ContentWriter.tsx → "AI Content Writer" / "Rédigez du contenu optimisé AEO"
- PublisherRequest.tsx → "Publisher Request" / "Soumettez une demande de publication"
- AiCitationSimulator.tsx → "Simulateur Citation IA" / "Simulez les citations IA pour vos contenus"
- AnswerFirstAudit.tsx → "Audit Answer-First" / "Vérifiez que vos pages répondent en premier"
- EeatBuilder.tsx → "E-E-A-T Builder" / "Renforcez votre E-E-A-T pour les moteurs IA"
- AiResponseLayer.tsx → "AI Response Layer" / "Analysez les couches de réponse IA"
- AiMonitoring.tsx → "Monitoring IA" / "Surveillez votre visibilité dans les moteurs IA"
- AlertsAEO.tsx → "Alertes AEO" / "Gérez vos alertes de visibilité"
- Reputation.tsx → "Réputation IA" / "Analysez votre réputation dans les IA"
- BotTracking.tsx → "Suivi des Bots" / "Suivez l'activité des bots IA sur votre site"
- Directory.tsx → "Annuaire Indexé" / "Explorez l'annuaire des sites optimisés"
- DirectoryEntity.tsx → skip (has its own layout)
- Recharge.tsx → "GTO Gas" / "Rechargez vos crédits"
- Account.tsx → skip (has its own complex tab header)
- Clients.tsx → "Base Clients" / "Gérez vos clients et leurs projets"
- Affiliation.tsx → "Affiliation" / "Gérez votre programme d'affiliation"
- MissionOrders.tsx → "Ordres de Mission" / "Gérez vos missions"
- Messages.tsx → "Messages" / "Centre de messagerie"
- History.tsx → "Historique" / "Consultez l'historique de vos audits"
- Integrations.tsx → "Intégrations" / "Connectez vos outils"
- ApiDeveloper.tsx → "API Developer Hub" / "Accédez à l'API CitedBy"
- ActionPlan.tsx → skip (likely has its own header)
- Plan.tsx → skip (account-related)

Process the files in order. For each file:
1. Read it
2. Add import PageHeader if needed
3. Remove wrapper padding from outermost div
4. Add PageHeader as first child
5. Save the changes

Do NOT skip any file just because it's complex. At minimum, remove the wrapper padding from every page.

IMPORTANT: The outer wrapper div should have NO padding, no max-width, no min-height. Just `<div>` or `<div className="space-y-6">` etc. The padding comes from AppShell.

1→import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'; 2→ 3→// Animated counter hook 4→const useCountUp = (target: number, duration = 1200) => { 5→ const [count, setCount] = useState(0); 6→ const ref = useRef(null); 7→ useEffect(() => { 8→ const observer = new IntersectionObserver(([entry]) => { 9→ if (entry.isIntersecting) { 10→ let start = 0; 11→ const startTime = performance.now(); 12→ const step = (now: number) => { 13→ const progress = Math.min((now - startTime) / duration, 1); 14→ const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 3); // ease-out cubic 15→ setCount(Math.round(eased * target)); 16→ if (progress < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step); 17→ }; 18→ requestAnimationFrame(step); 19→ observer.disconnect(); 20→ } 21→ }, { threshold: 0.3 }); 22→ if (ref.current) observer.observe(ref.current); 23→ return () => observer.disconnect(); 24→ }, [target, duration]); 25→ return { count, ref }; 26→}; 27→import { 28→ Plus, 29→ FileText, 30→ Users, 31→ MessageSquare, 32→ Bell, 33→ ShoppingBag, 34→ Settings, 35→ Search, 36→ ChevronLeft, 37→ ChevronRight, 38→ TrendingUp, 39→ AlertTriangle, 40→ Fuel, 41→ Share2, 42→ BarChart3, 43→ Target, 44→ ArrowUpRight, 45→ ArrowDownRight 46→} from 'lucide-react'; 47→import { AreaChart, Area, XAxis, YAxis, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer } from 'recharts'; 48→import { AnalysisResult } from '../types'; 49→ 50→interface DashboardProps { 51→ onBack: () => void; 52→ history: AnalysisResult[]; 53→ onView: (analysis: AnalysisResult) => void; 54→ onNavigate: (view: any) => void; 55→} 56→ 57→type TableRow = { 58→ url: string; 59→ score: number; 60→ citation: string; 61→ date: string; 62→ status: string; 63→ statusClass: string; 64→ original?: AnalysisResult; 65→}; 66→ 67→const Dashboard: React.FC = ({ onBack, history, onView, onNavigate }) => { 68→ const scoreKpi = useCountUp(78); 69→ const citationKpi = useCountUp(68); 70→ const projectsKpi = useCountUp(5, 800); 71→ const alertsKpi = useCountUp(3, 800); 72→ 73→ // Données de démonstration pour matcher l'image si l'historique est vide 74→ const demoData: TableRow[] = [ 75→ { url: 'example.com/article-1', score: 85, citation: '78%', date: 'Il y a 2h', status: 'Excellent', statusClass: 'bg-purple-400/20 text-purple-300' }, 76→ { url: 'myblog.com/guide-seo', score: 72, citation: '65%', date: 'Il y a 5h', status: 'Bon', statusClass: 'bg-primary/20 text-primary' }, 77→ { url: 'tech-news.io/ai-trends', score: 88, citation: '82%', date: 'Hier', status: 'Excellent', statusClass: 'bg-purple-400/20 text-purple-300' }, 78→ { url: 'startup.co/blog/growth', score: 58, citation: '42%', date: 'Hier', status: 'Moyen', statusClass: 'bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400' }, 79→ { url: 'ecommerce.shop/products', score: 91, citation: '88%', date: 'Il y a 2 jours', status: 'Excellent', statusClass: 'bg-purple-400/20 text-purple-300' }, 80→ ]; 21→ 22→ // Selection State 23→ const [selectedNiche, setSelectedNiche] = useState(null); 24→ const [scope, setScope] = useState('national'); 25→ const [location, setLocation] = useState(''); // For local/national 26→ 27→ // Authority State 28→ const [authorityLevel, setAuthorityLevel] = useState(1); Bon pour la longue traîne.' }, 48→ { level: 2, name: 'Premium', da: 'DA 40-60', price: 350, desc: 'Sites reconnus et médias spécialisés.
